## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link the motivating issue. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / performance / chore (`refactor:` / `perf:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] Both test suites pass locally: `cd src-tauri && cargo test --workspace` and `npm test`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` and `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` are clean
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) and are **signed** (`git commit -S`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / MANUAL / ADRs) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or environment-specific config committed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
